span.p:
Launcher
scripts/gemini_run.py
- Python 3.9+ guard
- venv re-exec
- env bootstrap

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 34) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Dispatch
core/cli/dispatch.py
- whitelist
- flag parse
- dry-run enforce

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 34) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Router
core/routing/router.py
- model selection
- capability gate

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 34) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Coordinator
core/transport/coordinator.py
- SDK first
- raw HTTP fallback
